name: IT Automation & AI Agents
description: Building intelligent systems that reason and act — from ReAct-loop agents to NOC automation. Turning operational complexity into programmable workflows.

name: Mobile & Web Development
description: Cross-platform apps with Flutter that run natively on iOS, Android, and Web. Clean architecture, Firebase backend, and production-ready from day one.

name: Workflow Automation (n8n)
description: Designing and deploying n8n automation pipelines on self-hosted infrastructure. Connecting APIs, automating repetitive tasks, and reclaiming human time.
